creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Routine bug-fix update to version 3.1.3.

From the announce message:

   "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.1.3, a bugfix-only release with updates to
    5 languages.

    Details will appear on http://phpmyadmin.net. In a hurry? you can
    visit http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin.

    Marc Delisle, for the team"

Changelog is at: http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=664683
